text: Stepping into this space, I feel a sense of anticipation, mingled with mild dislocation. The ambient glow, the glass barrier, and the R+D wall speak of innovation and inquiry, yet there is a sterility beneath the surface. My curiosity is piqued, but I am also strangely outside myself, caught between the promise of discovery and the impersonal precision of the environment. I am keen to learn, but aware of an underlying uncertainty—a liminality that makes my presence feel provisional.
